## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature impacting existing APIs)
- [ ] Refactor / Code cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition or update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build / CI change
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related Issue / Tracker

<!--
Pick one:
- Closes #N — this PR closes a single bug/feature/task
- Part of #N — this PR is one sub-task of a tracker
- No related issue
-->

- [ ] Closes #
- [ ] Part of tracker #
- [ ] No related issue

- [ ] AI Integration

- [ ] Agent System

- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows Kurisu's coding conventions and style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I added comments for complex or non-obvious code
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] Added new tests for any new functionality
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] No new compiler warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] PR only includes changes relevant to the issue/feature
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and follow conventional format
